Name: NACHTIGAL HYDRO POWER COMPANY
Description:
Nachtigal Hydro Power Company (NHPC), est une SA de droit camerounais créée le 7 juillet 2016 par l'Etat du Cameroun, #Africa 50 #EDF,  #IFC et Stoa. 
Elle a pour mission la conception, le financement, la construction de l'aménagement hydroélectrique de Nachtigal et de la ligne de transport d'évacuation d'énergie. Elle s'est également vue confiée par l'état, l'exploitation de l'aménagement hydroélectrique pendant 35 ans.
Le projet Nachtigal est un atout majeur pour résorber 30% du déficit énergétique au Cameroun.
Le siège social de Nachtigal est situé à la Nouvelle Route Bastos à Yaoundé.

Name: Norte Energia
Description:
Norte Energia, empresa empreendedora da Usina Belo Monte, a maior hidrelétrica 100% brasileira.

Em operação desde abril de 2016, Belo Monte conta com 24 Unidades Geradoras (UGs), totalizando 11.233,1 MW de capacidade instalada. São 18 UGs de 611,11 MW na Casa de Força Principal (11.000 MW) e outras seis de 38,85 MW na Casa de Força Complementar (233,1 MW).

Name: Santo Antônio Energia
Description:
A Santo Antônio Energia é a empresa responsável pela implantação e operação da Hidrelétrica Santo Antônio, localizada no rio Madeira, a sete quilômetros de Porto Velho, Rondônia. A hidrelétrica começou a gerar energia em 30 de março de 2012, nove meses antes do cronograma original.  

Atualmente, a Hidrelétrica Santo Antônio encontra-se na geração plena, com todas as 50 turbinas em operação comercial e potência instalada de 3.568 Megawatts, energia suficiente para o consumo de mais de 45 milhões de brasileiros. 

Parte da energia produzida pela Hidrelétrica Santo Antônio percorre cerca de 2.400 km por meio do “Linhão do Madeira” – uma das maiores linhas de transmissão de corrente contínua do mundo, saindo de Porto Velho até a cidade de Araraquara, no interior de São Paulo. De lá, a energia é distribuída para diversos estados brasileiros por meio do SIN – Sistema Interligado Nacional.

Das 50 turbinas da hidrelétrica, seis produzem energia com exclusividade para o sistema regional Rondônia – Acre, abastecendo até 40% do consumo dos dois estados por meio de uma linha específica de transmissão em 230 Kv.

Name: ELECTROPERU S.A.
Description: ELECTROPERU S.A. es una empresa Estatal de derecho privado que tiene como objetivo dedicarse a las actividades propias de la generación de energía eléctrica, con el fin de asegurar el abastecimiento oportuno, suficiente, garantizado y económico de la demanda de energía, de acuerdo a lo dispuesto en la legislación vigente.

Name: JIRAU ENERGIA
Description:
A Jirau Energia é a maior usina hidrelétrica do mundo em quantidade de turbinas e a 4ª maior geradora de energia elétrica do país.

Há 12 anos gerando energia renovável de forma sustentável na Amazônia.

O compromisso da Jirau Energia é fornecer energia limpa e renovável, minimizando o impacto ambiental e promovendo a preservação do meio ambiente. A empresa consolidou sua posição ao alcançar o melhor índice de disponibilidade entre as hidrelétricas de grande porte do país, otimizando o aproveitamento das águas do Rio Madeira. 

Com uma capacidade impressionante de 3.750 MW, suficiente para atender mais de 40 milhões de pessoas, a UHE Jirau é um dos maiores empreendimentos de infraestrutura na Amazônia e no mundo. Equipada com 50 turbinas tipo bulbo, é a maior do mundo em quantidade de turbinas, apresentando as mais potentes em geração unitária, com 75 MW.

Guiada por valores como ética, trabalho em equipe, integridade, comprometimento e austeridade, a Jirau Energia opera dentro dos princípios de desenvolvimento sustentável, valorização dos recursos humanos e conservação dos recursos naturais e histórico-culturais.

Em 2023, a empresa celebrou uma década de operação comercial, atingindo a marca significativa de mais de 130 milhões de MWh de energia gerada. Essa conquista, registrada no Mecanismo de Desenvolvimento Limpo da ONU, contribuiu para a redução anual de seis milhões de toneladas de carbono, fortalecendo o desenvolvimento sustentável na região Amazônica.

A Jirau Energia é uma Sociedade de Propósito Específico (SPE), contando com acionistas de peso, como ENGIE (40%), Eletrobras Eletrosul (20%), Eletrobras Chesf (20%) e Mizha Participações S.A. (20%), subsidiária da Mitsui & CO., LTD.

A trajetória da empresa começou em 2008, quando venceu o Leilão 005/2008 promovido pelo Governo Federal, obtendo a outorga para a implantação e operação da Usina Hidrelétrica Jirau no Rio Madeira (Porto Velho, RO) e a exploração do seu potencial energético pelo prazo de 35 anos.

Name: Entidad Binacional Yacyretá
Description:
La Entidad Binacional Yacyretá fue creada por el Tratado firmado en 1973 entre Paraguay y Argentina con el propósito esencial de desarrollar un aprovechamiento hidroeléctrico y mejorar las condiciones de navegabilidad del río Paraná a la altura de la isla Yacyretá.
Nuestro complejo hidroeléctrico es hoy el principal generador de energía eléctrica de la Argentina y uno de las más grandes de América Latina.
En 2021 se alcanzaron cifras récord en la generación de energía habiendo acumulado una generación de 13.363 GWh en el año
En la actualidad Yacyretá lleva a cabo la construcción de una nueva central en el brazo Aña Cuá. Esta permitirá incrementar la producción en aproximadamente un 9% a la vez que genera nuevas fuentes laborales , y oportunidades para las empresas de ambas márgenes del río Paraná
Durante su construcción Yacyretá ha ejecutado y supervisado más de 2.000 obras para la recuperación de áreas de valor económico, social y cultural.
Se realizó la construcción viviendas para la población afectada por el llenado del embalse a cota 83 msnm. Se han construido caminos y rutas se ha realizado el tratamiento costero a lo largo del embalse También la EBY proveyó la reposición funcional de infraestructura edilicia y se han ejecutado obras de infraestructura eléctrica y construcción de cloacas y plantas de tratamiento.
Desde su área social la empresa interactúa con la población afectada por el embalse. Se desarrollan políticas de acompañamiento que contribuyen al mejor desarrollo de las familias que fueron relocalizadas.
Mediante la implementación de programas de capacitación se ha permitido a la población afectada ampliar sus horizontes tanto a nivel educativo como laboral.
En materia de medio ambiente contamos con 120.000 hectáreas de reservas y áreas protegidas en las que trabajamos en forma continua y permanente en el cuidado y protección de la biodiversidad de la región.

Name: Sinop Energia
Description: A Sinop Energia é responsável pela construção e operação da Usina Hidrelétrica (UHE) Sinop. Uma sociedade de propósito específico que tem como acionistas as empresas EDF Brasil e Eletrobrás. A empresa foi criada com o objetivo exclusivo de construir, implantar, operar, manter e comercializar a energia gerada pela Usina Hidrelétrica (UHE) Sinop por 35 anos.

Name: KIKOT-MBEBE HYDRO POWER COMPANY (KHPC)
Description:
Our Company is a joint-venture between the State of Cameroon and the
Electricité de France Group (EDF). KHPC aims to design, build and operate the Kikot-Mbebe hydroelectric facility on the Sanaga River, with an installed capacity of 500 MW, the major one in the cenral Africa sub-region.

Name: SHEM Société Hydro-Electrique du Midi
Description: Hydroelectricity

Name: WaterPower Canada | Hydroélectricité Canada
Description:
WaterPower Canada (WPC) is the national voice of Canada’s waterpower industry. As a not-for-profit trade association, WPC represents members across the sector, including hydropower producers, manufacturers, and developers, who collectively account for over 95% of Canada’s waterpower capacity, advocating for the sustainable development and use of waterpower to meet Canada’s current and future energy needs.  

Subscribe to our newsletter: http://eepurl.com/hvOaTL
Become a member: https://waterpowercanada.ca/membership/
Learn more at waterpowercanada.ca

Hydroélectricité Canada (HC) est l’association nationale qui représente l’industrie hydroélectrique canadienne. En tant qu’association à but non lucratif, HC regroupe des membres de l’ensemble du secteur, y compris des producteurs d’hydroélectricité, des fabricants d’équipements et des développeurs qui représentent collectivement plus de 95 % de la capacité hydroélectrique du Canada. À ce titre, l’association promeut le développement durable et le recours à l’hydroélectricité pour répondre aux besoins énergétiques actuels et futurs du Canada. 

Inscrivez-vous à notre infolettre: http://eepurl.com/hvOYTj
Devenez membre et informez-vous sur hydroelectricitecanada.ca

Name: Lunsemfwa Hydro Power Company Limited
Description: Lunsemfwa Hydro Power Company Limited is a Hydro Electric Power Company based in Kabwe Zambia

Name: Grupo Lago Escondido
Description:
29 años de producción en perfecto equilibrio con la naturaleza. Lago Escondido, Río Negro, 
Con nuestras acciones y proyectos nos convertimos en una Empresa referente en la Patagonia Argentina. 

Nos especializamos en diferentes actividades sustentables y con un fuerte compromiso social empresarial. Contamos con la experiencia y el oficio de nuestro equipo para ofrecer servicios de excelencia a todas aquellas empresas y emprendimientos que buscan nuestro mismo estándar de calidad. 

Nuestro espíritu innovador y emprendedor nos lleva a proyectar todos los días.

Name: VS Group
Description:
At the heart of development is science, knowledge of which is translated to creation of solutions to human problems. The VS Group is a global enterprise founded and domiciled in Sri Lanka with a global presence in Asia, Africa and Oceania. Founded on the basis of scientific knowledge and craft, the company develop and improve on technological solutions in different sectors and industries worldwide.

VS Hydro is a fully integrated hydro company originating from Sri Lanka and operating in Africa. Established in 1972 to manufacture scientific equipment for schools we soon became the first solar and hydro developer and contractor in Sri Lanka.

In 2009, the Company made a strategic decision to bring its expertise to East Africa. The expansion business model of VS has been to enter a new territory by first securing an EPC contract and eventually owning and operating its own projects.

After the commissioning of VS’s first project in Uganda, an 18 MW project called Mpanga, the Company applied to develop 3 sites in Uganda. These projects, Siti 1, Siti 2 and Nyamagasani1, together with Nyamaghasani2, Lubilia and Kakaka which VS guided through the Pre-implementation processes, are now completed. VS constructed 7 of the 17 Getfit projects in Uganda.

VS has also completed a 5MW project in Kenya and has been awarded a further two contracts. During the construction phase of Gura, VS developed its own sites in Kenya. At present VS holds concessions totaling a possible installed capacity of 78 MW. 

In Rwanda, VS carried out full retrofit and rehabilitation for 3 projects for the client Prime Energy and another 10MW project is under construction. VS is also implementing 3 other projects in Rwanda, and actively pursuing several new project concessions including 20MW cross border.

After being awarded a project in Zimbabwe, VS identified 2 new sites in the country. 

This year VS is in the final stages of being financed of several project in Kenya, Uganda, Zimbabwe, Malawi.

Name: VIRTUAAL PARENG HYDRO PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: VIRTUAAL PARENG HYDRO PRIVATE LIMITED is an hydro power generation company based out of Arunachal Pradesh, India.

Name: Eagle Creek Renewable Energy LLC
Description:
Eagle Creek Renewable Energy was founded in 2010 to acquire, enhance and operate small hydroelectric power facilities.  Eagle Creeks’ facilities provide clean energy to electricity consumers in North America while allowing recreational opportunities and protecting historical resources and the environment.  Eagle Creek currently owns and operates eighty-six hydroelectric facilities representing approximately 640 megawatts of capacity across  the United States.  Eagle Creek also has ownership interests equivalent to approximately 12 megawatts in fourteen other hydroelectric facilities and two solar facilities in New England.

Eagle Creek is a privately-owned entity and is wholly-owned subsidiary of Ontario Power Generation.

In November 2018, Ontario Power Generation (OPG) acquired Eagle Creek from Hudson Clean Energy Partners, Power Energy Corporation and its other previous investors. On October 8, 2019, Ontario Power Generation announced the finalization of the acquisition of Cube Hydro Partners and Helix Partners (collectively, Cube Hydro) from I Squared Capital. The two companies are now merging into one, operating under the Eagle Creek Renewable Energy Name. 

Eagle Creek continues to seek opportunities to acquire hydroelectric facilities and improve them to increase clean power production, operate them in harmony with the environment and enhance the value of the company's hydroelectric portfolio for its investor, employees, host communities and all stakeholders in the projects.

Name: ORPC
Description:
Proven and reliable underwater power systems that generate energy from free-flowing tides and rivers, ORPC improves people’s lives and their environment through sustainable energy solutions. A global leader in marine energy technology and project solutions, we are initially focused on solving the problem of high cost diesel power generation in remote islanded communities by harnessing the power of ocean and river currents to create predictable, locally produced and reliable energy. 
 
Worldwide we are the only company to have built, operated and delivered power to a utility grid from a tidal energy project, and to a local microgrid from a river power project. ORPC is committed to working with local partners and creating local economic opportunities.
 
In 2019, ORPC launched its commercial RivGen Power System in Igiugig, Alaska, supplying energy to the remote community and setting a record as the longest operating current energy converter device in the Americas. ORPC has installed a second RivGen device in Igiugig, along with smart grid technology and energy storage, with the goal of decreasing the community’s diesel fuel use by 60-90%.
 
ORPC has developed a globally respected knowledge database of fisheries and marine life interaction with our power systems, and in over a decade, no known adverse impacts have been observed in either river or ocean environments. Our projects are carried out in full collaboration with local communities, universities, environmental agencies, fishing industry groups and other stakeholders. 
 
ORPC is pursuing strategic and financial partnerships that will allow us to expand our operations in North America, South America and Europe, and supply our commercial power systems and expertise worldwide where ocean and river energy resources exist.

Name: Ontario Waterpower Association
Description:
Since 2001 the Ontario Waterpower Association (OWA) has been representing the common and collective interests of the waterpower industry. To date our membership has grown to over 150 organizations, including generators, engineering firms, environmental consultants, legal, project financing and insurance firms, Aboriginal communities and other organizations, all sharing the common interest of advancing waterpower in Ontario.

The OWA hosts the Power of Water Canada Technical Conference & Trade Show annually, which has now grown to be the largest gathering of the hydroelectric sector in Canada.

Name: Comisión Técnica Mixta Salto Grande
Description:
La Comisión Técnica Mixta de Salto Grande es un organismo binacional creado por la República Argentina y la República Oriental del Uruguay para aprovechar los rápidos del río Uruguay.
El Complejo Hidroeléctrico Salto Grande es un ejemplo de integración y unión entre dos pueblos en la misión de producir y suministrar energía eléctrica a través del aprovechamiento del rio  y de una efectiva administración, preservando el medio ambiente y contribuyendo al desarrollo socioeconómico y a la integración de ambos países.

El complejo se encuentra  ubicado en el kilómetro 342,6 del río Uruguay, aguas arriba de las ciudades de Concordia (Argentina) y Salto (Uruguay).  Posee catorce unidades hidrogeneradoras  y cada una tiene 135 MW de potencia. Se obtiene, de esta manera, un total de potencia instalada de 1.890 MW, con un promedio de generación media anual de diseño de 6.700 GWh. En lo  transcurridos hasta 2018 se ha generado un total de 314.967 GWh.
Salto Grande produce el 7 % de la energía consumida en Argentina y el 50% de la utilizada en Uruguay.
El sistema de transmisión tiene 345 kms de líneas de 500 kV y cuatro estaciones transformadoras. Puede transmitir hasta 4.000 MVA con cuarenta y cuatro interruptores de 500 kV.

La Represa de Salto Grande es el primer complejo hidroeléctrico binacional de Latinoamérica,  importante por su ubicación estratégica, permitiendo que el flujo de energía circule con Brasil y entre Argentina y Uruguay.

Somos una organización que tiene como propósito obtener el mayor beneficio de las disposiciones naturales que ofrece el río Uruguay, realizándolo con recursos técnicos actualizados, y en un marco de calidad, cuidando el ambiente y con responsabilidad social.

Name: Empresa de Generación Huallaga S.A.
Description:
Nos encargamos de la operación y mantenimiento de la Central Hidroeléctrica Chaglla. Somos parte de China Three Gorges (CTG), líder mundial en energía limpia.

La Central Hidroeléctrica Chaglla se encuentra en la margen izquierda del río Huallaga, entre los distritos de Chaglla y San Pablo de Pillao, provincias de Pachitea y Huánuco, en la región de Huánuco. Es la tercera más grande del país con una potencia instalada de 456 MW, que nos permite suministrar hasta el 7% del total de energía que se consume en el territorio peruano a través del Sistema Eléctrico Interconectado Nacional (SEIN). 

Contribuimos con la reducción de un millón 800 mil toneladas de emisiones de CO2 por año, pues incorporamos a la matriz energética nacional fuentes de energía renovable y limpia.

Name: Energy Infratech Private Limited
Description: Energy Infratech seeks to leverage its extensive pool of intellectual capital for adding value to the efforts of power project developers in India and abroad. The Company also intends to build its capacity to provide services for associated energy infrastructure.

Name: Manawa Energy
Description:
Manawa Energy is one of Aotearoa New Zealand’s largest renewable electricity generators. Our goal is to develop renewable generation to support our country’s ambitions for a thriving, low-emissions and climate-resilient future.

Manawa Energy also operates a commercial and industrial electricity business with approximately 680 customers at more than 14,000 electricity connections nationally, currently supplying approximately 1,250GWh per annum.

Name: Nam Theun 2
Description:
The Nam Theun 2 Hydropower Company is an industrial and development investment owned by two private shareholders and the Lao Government, backed by commercial lenders and international financial institutions including the World Bank and the Asian Development Bank.

NTPC is composed of three shareholders: 40% represented by Electricité de France International (EDFI), 35% by Thailand’s Electricity Generating Public Company (EGCO) and 25% owned by the Lao Government through Lao Holding State Enterprise (LHSE).

NTPC is dedicated to running a world class hydropower facility and to improving the living conditions of people in the areas around the Project. 
The company is also committed to achieving the highest standard of environmental stewardship and protection of the environment for current and future generations.

The Power station has an installed capacity of 1,070 MW that can generate 6000 GWh of electricity per year. About 95% of the power is exported to Thailand.
Nam Theun 2 is recognized as a vehicle for national growth and development in Laos. NTPC is expected to generate 2 billion US$ in government revenue over the 25 year concession period.

For more information, the Nam Theun 2 corporate film can be viewed at: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lamIrmejEmE

Name: Powerturbines
Description: Powerturbines is an specialized company in small hydroturbines for energy recovery in water networks (irrigation, drinking water, raw water, etc.). Our technology is based on the use of pump as turbines (PAT) and we can offer turbines for battery charging (interesting on places without grid access) or connected to the grid for self-consumption or energy selling.

Name: Eletrisa
Description:
A Eletrisa, fundada no ano de 2007, iniciou suas atividades direcionada à gestão administrativa, financeira e societária de usinas de geração de energia renovável. Em 2013, expandiu sua atuação abrangendo o Planejamento e Controle da Manutenção de usinas que, hoje, contam com bases técnicas no Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina e Paraná, de forma a garantir o pronto-atendimento de seus clientes.
Em 2018, foi criado o Centro de Operação da Geração, que atua 24 horas por dia, sete dias por semana, realizando toda a operação remota das usinas no padrão do ONS.
Prezando sempre pela qualidade nos serviços entregues aos nossos clientes, em 2021, alcançamos as certificações ISO 9001, 14001 e 45001, que espelham nosso comprometimento e responsabilidade para com o setor energético. 
No ano de 2022, a Opersul, que é dona de um extenso portfólio de serviços prestados para UHE’s de grande porte no Brasil e no exterior, foi adquirida pela Eletrisa e, desde então, esse novo reposicionamento trouxe novas perspectivas para a atuação no segmento de grandes usinas. 
Além disso, no mesmo ano, os sócios da Eletrisa iniciaram uma nova startup, a Eletrify, cujo foco é o desenvolvimento de soluções para o setor elétrico, por meio de tecnologias IIoT e algoritmos de AI, atuando como grande fornecedora da Eletrisa. 
Em 2023, firmamos parceria com a Voith, tornando-nos sua primeira Official Partner no Brasil.

Name: EDC Cameroun (Electricity Development Corporation)
Description:
𝐏𝐫é𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞
Electricity Development Corporation (EDC) est une société à capital public détenue à 100% par l’État du Cameroun. Créé par décret du Chef de l’État N° 2006/406 du 29 novembre 2006, EDC évolue dans le secteur national de l'électricité régi par la loi n° 2011/022 du 14 décembre 2011. 

L'entreprise est placée sous la tutelle technique du Ministère de l'Eau et de l'Energie et sous la tutelle financière du Ministère des Finances. Quatre organes assurent le fonctionnement de l'entreprise à savoir: l'Assemblée Générale, le Conseil d'Administration, la Direction Générale, et le Commissaire aux Comptes.

 Le siège social de EDC est basé à Yaoundé, sis à l'immeuble Hibiscus. L'entreprise totalise un effectif d'environ quatre cent personnes réparties entre le siège social basé à Yaoundé, la représentation régionale de Bertoua, l'antenne du Nord à Garoua, l'antenne de l'Ouest à Bafoussam, l'antenne du Sud à Ebolowa et les barrages de Lom Pangar, Mbakaou, Bamendjin, Memve'ele et Mapé. 

 𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬
● La gestion pour le compte de l’État, du patrimoine public dans le secteur de l'électricité;
● L'étude, la préparation ou la réalisation de tout projet d'infrastructure dans le secteur de l'électricité qui lui est confié par l’État;
● La participation à la promotion des investissements publics et privés dans le secteur de l'électricité.
● L'appui-conseil dans le secteur de l'électricité. 

 𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐎𝐛𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐬
Accroitre l'offre d'énergie électrique au Cameroun, en quantité et en qualité pour favoriser le développement durable de la nation. Pour y parvenir, EDC a opéré le choix stratégique de valoriser le potentiel hydroélectrique et notamment celui du fleuve Sanaga qui représente à lui seul près de 70% de tout le potentiel hydroéléctrique du Cameroun.

Name: Sidewinders, LLC
Description:
Sidewinders LLC is a premier generator maintenance and repair company providing reliable and efficient service to our customers.  We are committed to serving the power generation industry with outstanding safety, quality and performance—in that order—on every project, without exception.

Backed with strong, multi-OEM experience, Sidewinders provides a valuable option for clients when high profile scopes and specialty repairs arise. We have a portfolio of winders with various skill levels and experience, enabling us to supply the resources best suited for you and your project, ensuring both cost and expertise optimization. Our team members are honest, easy to work with, and unyielding in their effort to perform work flawlessly.

Using a customer-centric approach, Sidewinders performs a variety of services for generator rotor and stator maintenance and repair. We provide comprehensive testing and inspection of your equipment, applying industry best practices and our own expertise based on years of work in the power generation industry.

From the application of expert knowledge, to the implementation of strategies that address specific needs without compromising performance, Sidewinders is ready to work with you wherever you need our expertise in generator rotor and stator maintenance and repairs.

Name: Devoll Hydropower Sh.A.
Description:
Devoll Hydropower Sh.A. (DHP) është një kompani e regjistruar në Shqipëri, nën pronësi dhe e operuar prej kompanisë norvegjeze Statkraft AS. Në përputhje me një Marrëveshje Koncesioni të nënshkruar dhe miratuar nga Parlamenti Shqiptar në 2009, Devoll Hydropower ka ndërtuar dhe operon hidrocentralet e Banjës dhe Moglicës në kaskadën përgjatë Lumit Devoll, i cili ndodhet në pjesën jug-lindore të Shqipërisë. Kapaciteti total i instaluar i hidrocentraleve është rreth 269 MW.

DHP ka zyrat e saj në Tiranë dhe Banjë dhe operon një Qendër për Informimin e Publikut pranë zyrave të HEC Banjë.
 
--------------------
 
Devoll Hydropower Sh.A. (DHP) is an Albanian registered company, owned and operated by the Norwegian power company Statkraft AS. In line with a Concession Agreement signed and approved by the Albanian Parliament in 2009, Devoll Hydropower has implemented and is operating the  Banja & Moglicë  hydropower plants in cascade along the Devoll River, in southeast Albania. The total installed capacity of the hydropower plants is approx. 269 MW. 

DHP has its offices in Tirana and Banja, and also operates a Public Information Centre in the offices near Banja HPP.

Name: Rye Development
Description: Rye Development is advancing America’s next generation of pumped storage hydropower, the largest and most proven form of energy storage. Our diverse portfolio of energy storage projects helps ensure people will have reliable access to energy when they need it. We develop projects from inception to operations through site identification, permitting, offtake and construction. Rye works in partnership with utilities, policymakers, community leaders and other stakeholders to bring pumped storage hydropower projects to life.

Name: VibroSystM Inc.
Description: Established since 1986 in Québec, Canada, VibroSystM is a leading world-renowned manufacturer of condition monitoring systems for large rotating machines. With international key customers and equipment installed in over 75 countries, VibroSystM’s continuing growth is based on state-of-the-art expertise.

Name: Energyminer GmbH
Description:
We are revolutionizing hydropower by introducing a crucial form of base load-capable renewable energy generation. This approach is essential for achieving our energy transition goals. 
𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐜𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧, 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐲 𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐝𝐫𝐚𝐰𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬. 

Our solution, the Energyfish, is a scalable micro hydroelectric power production device designed to be suspended in rivers. It harnesses the water's flow to generate electricity. Our patent-pending technology ensures high efficiency, driving remarkable profitability. Notably, this is accomplished without the need for dam walls, while also safeguarding the local flora and fauna. Our objective is ambitious: within the next 5 years, we aim to deploy enough Energyfish to replace a significant coal-fired power plant in Germany. Looking ahead 10 years, our vision expands to installing over 100,000 Energyfish units across Europe, thereby establishing the largest virtual hydroelectric power station on the continent.

Name: Mira Power Limited
Description:

Mira Power Limited is a subsidiary of Korea South East Power Co. Ltd.

The Gulpur hydro power plant will have 100 MW power capacity with annual generation capability of 465 GWh. The Project site falls administratively in the Kotli district of AJK and located about 5 km south of Kotli town on the Poonch River, a tributary of Jhelum River. The site is about 170 km from Islamabad and 285 km from Lahore.

Reivax North America is a technological leader in power electronics, controls, and automation equipment. Operating for over 30 years in the world of power generation, Reivax has formed strong relationships with countless utilities and organizations all over the world. 

In today’s power generation market, the biggest reducible cost-driver is operations and maintenance. Reivax systems provide power stations the opportunity to ease maintenance, simplify operation, and extend the life of plant equipment. Our engineers and researchers are at the forefront of controls technology, allowing our static excitation systems, speed governors, and automation equipment to innovate the field.

With a dedicated service team available 24 hours a day for all 365 days of the year, Reivax can support our installed base through any issue. Let us provide you a reliable, affordable, and easy-to-use system.

It is a for-profit company with a social purpose. All Virunga Energies profits are either reinvested in developing its clean energy assets or in the conservation of Virunga National Park, a world heritage UNESCO site.

It has built over 30MW of carbon-free hydroelectric plants, operates a transmission and distribution network of 500km+ across 3 different geographies, provides free electricity to public infrastructures (public lighting, hospitals, schools) and manages 25k+ paying customers.

Virunga Energies is currently building additional generation and transmission capacity (28MW hydroplant in Rwanguba, high-voltage substations).

Name: Hippo Joint Industry Program Offshore Green Hydrogen Demo 1
Description:
TNO and Ventolines in 2023 launched a consortium of major energy companies in offshore wind and hydrogen for a Joint Industrial Program (JIP) for Dutch Demo 1 – Offshore Green Hydrogen (waterstof) Production. Today, Hippo (Hydrogen Industry Pilot Project Offshore) is an R&D JIP consortium for the major energy companies.

Demo 1 is a program to deliver learning objectives (TNO) for the sector through a 30 - 50 MW pilot to be installed in 2030. The program 100% funded by the Dutch government (380 Mio euro). An additional 150 Mio euro funding is provided for GasUnie and Tennet to deliver the infrastructure for DEMO1.

Hippo JIP DEMO1 Offshore Hydrogen R&D Program is working to deliver to the requirements of the government to start the workstreams of project in September 2025.

Contact: info@demo1.nl

Funding legislation:
https://www.rijksoverheid.nl/binaries/rijksoverheid/documenten/begrotingen/2024/09/17/m-klimaatfonds-rijksbegroting-2025/M+Klimaatfonds+Rijksbegroting+2025.pdf

Name: Summit Energy Solution
Description:
At Summit Energy Solutions Pvt. Ltd., we are driven by a vision to produce clean, green energy and reduce Nepal’s dependence on imported petroleum fuels. Our mission is to unlock the country’s vast hydroelectric potential, contributing to national energy security and sustainable economic growth by investing strategically in renewable water resources and skilled human capital.

Nepal’s path to energy independence requires strong collaboration between the public and private sectors. We advocate for greater public awareness of the challenges faced by hydroelectric entrepreneurs from difficult terrain to logistical and regulatory barriers and for transparency in the generation and distribution of power.

Despite policy support for hydropower development, practical implementation and ease of doing business remain challenging. Through our flagship project, the Bakan Khola Hydro-Electric Project (BKHEP 44 MW) in Sankhuwasabha, we aim to demonstrate responsible development that creates local employment, strengthens infrastructure, and empowers communities.

Every challenge presents an opportunity. Out of Nepal’s 83,000 MW of hydroelectric potential, only about 2,900 MW is currently harnessed. We are committed to turning this untapped potential into real value for investors, local communities, and the nation as a whole.

Name: ACenergetica
Green Power Technologies PR, LLC
Description:
Green Power Technologies PR, LLC's mission is to provide affordable and reliable renewable energy technology to emerging markets and remote regions where alternative energy solutions are expensive or undesirable. Our experts and industry partners have distinguished careers worldwide as leaders in environmental applications.

Water transportations with lower flows like pump stations, water treatment plants, pipelines, and small rivers worldwide have historically been bypassed for creating energy because of the relative inconsistency of flow throughout the day. The Variable Flow Hydropower System (VFH Turbine) generates peak energy from fluctuating water sources — which is how our technology differs from conventional impoundment hydroelectric facilities.

Establishments, businesses, and communities worldwide now have the opportunity to utilize lower water flows to provide independent (off-grid/on-grid) power to run on 100% renewable energy and help be carbon neutral.

GoFlo travelling water screens meet fisheries and eel regulations and automatically excludes debris down to 2 mm.

Using a sophisticated control system with remote operation to remove screen blockages, GoFlo travelling water screens increase hydropower energy yield and eliminates screen debris maintenance.

GoFlo has a robust, all stainless-steel construction with integrated quick install / removal system for easy maintenance. GoFlo – your automatic intake screen debris management system.

Nous sommes convaincus que ces infrastructures préparent dès aujourd’hui un avenir plus résilient, garantissant aux générations futures une eau maîtrisée et une énergie propre.

Name: Hydro Power Pods Ltd
Description:
Many waterways remain significantly underutilised for the generation of clean, renewable energy. Against a backdrop of escalating energy prices and the disproportionately high energy bills faced by remote UK regions, there exists an untapped potential beyond the current 1.7% contribution from existing large hydrostatic-head schemes.

In response, HydroPowerPods is pioneering an innovative solution designed to fully harness the power of waterways with low hydrostatic heads (under 2.5 m) for electricity generation. The company’s groundbreaking technology is poised to elevate the efficiency of low-head hydroelectric generation by an impressive 140% (2.4 times), vastly expanding the range of viable sites for low-head hydroelectric power.

Importantly, this development is engineered to harmonize with the natural environment, ensuring the preservation of factors like fish migration, while simultaneously enhancing waterway ecology through increased water aeration.

HydroPowerPods envisions its solution as a means to decentralize electricity production, playing a pivotal role in lifting the poorest and most remote households out of energy poverty.

By ensuring access to a low-cost and reliable power supply, the company aims to contribute to sustainable and equitable development.

Name: Green Hydrogen Technology of Bhutan
Description: Green hydrogen is enjoying unprecedented political and business momentum worldwide, expanding rapidly. Bhutan is also planning to venture into such a promising technology to keep abreast of the latest emerging energy technology. To keep Bhutan pace with the introduction and development of hydrogen energy systems in the coming decades, this page offers platforms for sharing knowledge and will serve as an advocacy with the right technological informations.

Name: AJK Power Development Organization
Description:
The AJK Power Development Organization (AJK PDO) is a government-owned entity responsible for the development, generation, and management of hydropower resources in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK), Pakistan. Established to harness the region's vast hydropower potential, AJK PDO plays a pivotal role in promoting sustainable energy solutions, supporting economic growth, and ensuring energy security for the region. The organization is actively involved in planning, constructing, and operating hydropower projects, while also fostering partnerships with national and international stakeholders to advance clean energy initiatives. AJK PDO is committed to driving innovation, environmental sustainability, and socio-economic development through its energy projects.

Key Focus Areas:

Hydropower project development and management

Renewable energy initiatives

Sustainable energy solutions

Regional economic and infrastructure development

Mission: To utilize AJK's natural resources for clean energy production, contributing to the region's prosperity and Pakistan's energy needs.

Vision: To become a leading organization in renewable energy development, ensuring a sustainable and energy-secure future for AJK and beyond.

Name: Costruzioni Generali Italiane Spa
Description:
Azienda specializzata nella progettazione, produzione e fornitura di tubazioni e pezzi speciali di alta qualità per impianti idroelettrici e recipienti a pressione. 
Tutti i nostri prodotti sono realizzati in conformità con le normative e gli standard di sicurezza più rigorosi, come la PED (Direttiva sulla pressione degli apparecchi) e la ASME (Società americana degli ingegneri meccanici).
Offriamo una vasta gamma di prodotti, tra cui tubazioni in acciaio al carbonio, acciaio inossidabile, , nonché recipienti a pressione come serbatoi, scambiatori di calore e reattori. 
Il nostro team altamente qualificato di ingegneri e tecnici specializzati nella progettazione e produzione di tubazioni idroelettriche e recipienti a pressione utilizza le tecnologie più avanzate per garantire la massima efficienza e sicurezza dei nostri prodotti.
Siamo impegnati nella sostenibilità ambientale, adottiamo processi produttivi a basso impatto e implementiamo politiche aziendali volte a ridurre l’impatto dei nostri prodotti sull'ambiente.

A hidrelétrica começou a gerar energia em 20 de fevereiro de 2002. Atualmente, a Hidrelétrica encontra-se em operação comercial, fornecendo energia suficiente para o consumo de mais de milhares de brasileiros.

The project has a build, own and operate (BOO) structure and is currently in the construction phase.

Name: ARWEDYS

GAD2V (Générateur Aqua Dynamic à Volumes Variables)

Le GAD2V est un dispositif innovant de génération d'énergie électrique exploitant le principe de la poussée d'Archimède à travers des ballasts (corps flottants) qui alternent entre montée et descente dans un réservoir d’eau. Ce mouvement est converti en énergie électrique par l’intermédiaire d’un mécanisme rotatif couplé à des génératrices.

Name: Water-Flow Energy
Description:
Water-Flow Energy is a Business Unit of Sasso s.r.l., active in the hydroelectric sector since 1925, the year of its foundation.

Since that year, we have been producing components for hydroelectric plants for all those who are and want to be self-producers of energy, exploiting the waterways and/or the integrated water cycle infrastructure available to them.

Water-Flow Energy is not only our name, but also the story of our work and our green philosophy.

Over the past 30 years, we have specialized in pico and micro hydro plants because we understood how they were the two most sustainable solutions for the administrations, companies, and citizens of the territories.

Additionally, to provide our customers a complete help in "Water" field, we have developed the Solar Pumping service - which uses solar energy to pump water, so it can be used to irrigate and / or redistribute it.

Name: ICH2P: 13th International Conference on Hydrogen Production
Description: The 13th International Conference on Hydrogen Production (ICH2P-2022) edition will be focused on the scientific developments of the sustainable generation of hydrogen via electrolysis, solar, wind, biological, catalytic and photo-catalytic based systems, paying particular attention to the production of hydrogen from renewables. Furthermore, the conference will provide the opportunity to share the latest research on hydrogen utilization in transportation, fuel cells, for greenhouse gases mitigation, and industry, as well as on hydrogen storage (chemical carriers, hydrides, gas, and liquefaction) and other emerging applications for industrial hydrogen generation and purification including the contribution of membrane engineering and hydrogen opportunities in space missions. ICH2P-2022 will offer a virtual forum where latest advances, technical information and dissemination of research projects in the areas of hydrogen production, separation and utilization can be shared, favoring exciting debates on the future directions and priorities of the hydrogen economy for a greener and sustainable future.

Name: Fluid Alliance
Description:
At FLUID ALLIANCE, we’re your trusted partner in all things hydraulic. 

With over 20 years of experience, we have earned the trust of our clients and become a leader in the hydraulic industry. 

Our journey began with a commitment to delivering quality and innovation in fluid power solutions, making us the top choice for businesses across many sectors.

Our experience has given us deep knowledge and understanding of hydraulic systems and their uses.

Shahre-Bijar hydro power plant is located about 35 km from Rasht consisting of 3 units of Francis Vertical turbines and has the total capacity of 6.3 MW. Rooted in a legacy of innovation, our mission is to reshape how the world thinks about clean energy.

Name: Jarvis Renewable Industries
Description:
Jarvis Industries has developed a novel type of power unit that exploits the energy of flowing water in rivers to generate reliable and affordable electricity at any scale. 
Our technology requires virtually no civil engineering hence posing very limited threats to local environments. Moreover, being sunk deep underwater, our units seamlessly integrate with the outside world as they are barely discernable from the surface and don't impact navigability.
Our technology is supported by robust simulations and small-scale experiments, conducted internally and verified by third-party experts, and we are currently starting commercial development.

Name: CU Boulder Student Hydropower Energy Team
Description:
The Hydropower Energy Team at the University of Colorado Boulder is a student-run organization dedicated to providing hands-on experience and career opportunities in the hydropower industry. We compete in the annual Hydropower Collegiate Competition, hosted by the National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL), where we apply engineering, policy, and business skills to real-world challenges.

This year, our team is developing a proposal for a theoretical closed-loop pumped storage hydropower facility, including siting analysis, cybersecurity integration, testing setup, and outreach strategy. Through innovation and collaboration, we aim to advance sustainable energy solutions and foster the next generation of hydropower professionals.

Name: KELP Systems Ltd
Description:
We believe the hydrokinetic potential of urban rivers can be harnessed to accelerate the world’s transition to clean, safe, sustainable energy.
 
We have designed an innovative, modular renewable energy system that draws on proprietary impeller technology to generate electricity from hydrokinetic environments and provide an additional source of clean energy for local microgrids.

In contrast to traditional large-bladed turbines, our system will be safer to use, easier to maintain and small enough to be sited directly within urban rivers, where energy consumption is at its highest.
 
The technology behind KELP Systems has received a positive evaluation from the Ocean Renewable Energy Catapult and is supported by Scottish Enterprise.

Name: APPLTA (Association of Indonesian Hydro Power Plant Developers)

Orbit Energy Ltd. is a forward-thinking hydropower development company established under the Company Act of 2066 as a private entity and now proudly upgraded to a public limited company, marking a major step in our growth and long-term vision. Our mission is to harness Nepal’s vast hydropower potential by developing clean, sustainable, and socially responsible energy projects that support a greener future.

Our flagship developments, the Sabha Khola-B Hydropower Project and Sabha Khola-C Hydropower Project located in the scenic district of Sankhuwasabha, reflect our commitment to engineering excellence and environmental stewardship. These projects are designed not only to generate reliable renewable energy but also to uplift local communities, stimulate regional economic growth, and contribute to Nepal’s sustainable development goals.

At Orbit Energy Ltd., we are dedicated to delivering energy solutions that balance innovation, sustainability, and long-term value for stakeholders and society.

The project is using Run-of-River technology and sits 241 kilometers upstream of Vientiane, the capital city of Lao PDR.

Name: SeaDog Systems, Inc.
Description:
Welcome to SeaDog Systems, Inc.

Harnessing Wave Power for the World!

SeaDog Systems, Inc. is proud to introduce the SeaDog Wave Pump and its related technologies, products and accessories. By efficiently harnessing the inherent natural power of waves and currents, SeaDog Systems’ suite of technologies and products generate renewable, baseload electrical power, produce abundant freshwater and provide extraordinary gas and liquid pumping solutions.

 SeaDog Wave Pump arrays can be located offshore, at the shoreline and even deep inland! Multiple or stand-alone systems can also be attached to bridge pilings, piers, docks and even the sides of ships, features which provide unmatched versatility. SeaDog Wave Pumps are also capable of pumping gas and liquids great distances. In addition, promising research is currently being done using SeaDog Pumps as propulsion for surface and subsurface craft.

 Nature provides the power that fuels all of SeaDog Systems’ innovative technologies, making them renewable, sustainable, emission free and the type of infrastructure-level technologies that can carry humanity well into the future!

Description: Lider en generación y transmisión de energía eléctrica en Guatemala, creemos fielmente en la integración de energías renovables.

Name: Cadre AS
Description:
Cadre er en norsk vannkraftsprodusent som eier, driver og utvikler småkraft. Vi er en trygg, erfaren og lønnsom partner for grunneiere over hele landet. Sammen skaper vi fornybar energi, vekst og verdier i hele Norge.  

Vi er stolte av å ha Nordkraft og HitecVision som våre største eiere. De investerer norsk kapital i at småkraften skal være en stor del av energiløsningen. Cadre har vokst raskt siden vi ble etablert i 2022. I løpet av få år skal vi levere 2 TWh vannkraft til Norge. Nok strøm til 125 000 norske husstander. 
 
Cadre bruker erfaringen vår til å få mer ut av elven, uten å ta mer av elven. Grunneiere og hele lokalsamfunnet rundt skal få sin rettmessige andel av verdiskapningen fra småkraftverkene våre, men de skal også være stolte over måten det skjer på. Cadre satser på nye løsninger og deler villig erfaringer med alle interesserte, blant annet om det som kalles «Norges første laksevennlige småkraftverk». 

Cadre har samlet ledende ekspertise på småkraft i kontorer langt utenfor Oslo, fordi vi vil og må være der det skjer. Vi er tett på hvert prosjekt og hver grunneier, fra kontrakten er signert og gjennom hele driftsperioden. Den suksessformelen gjør at vi får tillit fra stadig flere grunneiere.  

Har du et fall, utbyggingsprosjekt, en konsesjon eller et kraftverk i drift? 

Ta kontakt med oss!

Name: Foz do Chapecó Energia
Description:
A Foz do Chapecó Energia é a empresa detentora da concessão da Usina Hidrelétrica Foz do Chapecó, inaugurada em 2010 e localizada no rio Uruguai, na divisa entre Santa Catarina e Rio Grande do Sul, possui uma potência instalada de 855 MW, atendendo cerca de 28% do consumo de energia de Santa Catarina e 27% do Rio Grande do Sul.
 
Os acionistas da Foz do Chapecó Energia são a CPFL Energia, a Eletrobras e a CEEE Geração. Nossa barragem, com 598 metros de extensão e 48 metros de altura, foi a primeira no Brasil a utilizar a técnica do núcleo asfáltico, garantindo eficiência e segurança. 
 
Estamos sempre comprometidos com a responsabilidade socioambiental, implementando programas para a preservação ambiental e a melhoria da qualidade de vida das comunidades vizinhas. Para mais detalhes, acesse o site oficial Foz do Chapecó Energia.
 
Quer fazer parte do nosso time? Se cadastre no site e fique atento as vagas disponíveis:
https://www.fozdochapeco.com.br/fale-conosco/

Name: Littoral Power Systems, Inc.
Description:
LPS addresses the problems of cost, environmental impact, and regulatory complexity in hydropower and ocean energy. We develop sustainable and resilient approaches to water power technologies to reduce the time, cost and risk of getting projects built.

A core principle of our business is "Water Power for Good." To us, this is the commitment that wherever we go, the community, environment and stakeholders are bettered. As an emergent renewable energy company increasingly on the path to making a name for ourselves, we are acutely aware of our responsibility to provide leadership — both in thought and action — in this area.  The work required of us is complex and intolerant of technical risk. We must lead our team in a way that elevates our team and community. The only way to achieve this is to do excellent work in a responsible fashion and embed fairness in all decision-making processes.  Although we are a very small team, we are mindful that our actions impact multiple stakeholders, often in a profound way.

Name: Wasserkraft Volk AG
Description:
Wasserkraft Volk AG (WKV) ist ein deutscher Hersteller für Wasserkraftanlagen. WKV bietet die komplette elektro-mechanische Ausrüstung über Design, Auslegung, Konstruktion, Fertigung, Lieferung, Installation, Inbetriebnahme und lebenslangem Service aus einer Hand an. WKV ist der einzige Wasserkraft-Hersteller weltweit, welcher Turbinen und Generatoren unter einem Dach herstellt. WKV bietet den kompletten Lieferumfang "water-to-wire" für seine Kunden weltweit an, in höchster Qualität gemäß "Made in Germany". Neben Turbinen und Generatoren, wofür WKV 5 Jahre Garantie gewährt, liefert WKV sämtliche Komponenten für kleinere und mittlere Wasserkraftanalgen wie Regleraggregat, Steuerung, Mittelspannungs- und Hochspannungsanlagen (bis 220kV), Notstromaggregate, Krafthauskran etc.
Durch die hohe Qualität sind WKV Anlagen äußerst zuverlässig und haben dadurch eine extrem hohe Verfügbarkeit für den Kunden, was eine planmäßige Rückzahlung der Investition in erster Linie sicher stellt.

Name: Hydromenta Systems
Description:
Hydromenta Systems develops water, fluid, and hydraulic engineering solutions for industries and infrastructure that depend on efficient and reliable flow systems. Our work spans pipeline design, pressure control, fluid simulation, and advanced water treatment engineering.

We believe the future of engineering is deeply connected to the responsible use of water and energy. Hydromenta Systems works closely with municipalities, industrial plants, and environmental organizations to design systems that reduce waste, stabilize flow behavior, and ensure long-term resilience.

Our engineers bring together scientific modeling, real-world testing, and modern technology to create systems that adapt to environmental challenges. Every design is guided by efficiency, sustainability, and safety, ensuring consistent performance even in demanding conditions.

Hydromenta Systems aims to build a future where water engineering supports healthier communities, stronger industries, and smarter resource management.

Name: Driving the Future
Description:
The power is in your hands to drive the future! Introducing a new, three-part video series on the role hydropower plays in the energy transition.
For a look at what we are already doing with hydropower, renowned Swiss adventurer and clean energy advocate, Bertrand Piccard, teams with science journalist, Sam Pauly, to set out on an epic 1,000km journey across Switzerland. The duo travel the whole way using only electric vehicles and visit several of the hydropower plants that produce the country’s green electricity. 

Along their journey, our adventurers also speak to key experts and decision makers, including a stop off in Bern to meet the current President of the Swiss Confederation, Ignacio Cassis. They also hear from Norwegian politician Erik Solheim, the former Executive Director of United Nations Environment Programme; Pascal Radue, the President and CEO of Hydro Solutions at GE Renewable Energy; Claudia Dobles Camargo, the former First Lady of Costa Rica; and Pablo Valverde, the Deputy CEO of International Hydropower Association, among others. 

This isn’t simply a story about zero-carbon vehicles and hydropower; it’s about reimagining the way we live, travel, and consume, applying existing technology, and accelerating the energy transition so we can overcome humanity’s greatest challenge. 

Bertrand and Sam’s Swiss adventure proves the potential that this approach has, now it’s up to us to follow through. As Bertrand puts it, “change is needed, and the solutions are already in our hands – the race is on!”

Follow us on our other social media channels:
 Instagram - @drivingthefuture_
 Facebook - Driving the Future
 Twitter - @rivethefuture_

Name: Southwestern Power Administration
Description:
FAST FACTS
-One of four Power Marketing Administrations in the U.S.
-Markets cost-based, wholesale power and energy generated from 24 Federal, multi-purpose hydropower projects owned by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers.
-Service territory includes Arkansas, Kansas, Louisiana, Missouri, Oklahoma, Texas.

Southwestern Power Administration was established in 1943 by the Secretary of the Interior as a Federal Agency that today operates within the Department of Energy under the authority of Section 5 of the Flood Control Act of 1944. By law, Southwestern's power is marketed and delivered primarily to public bodies such as rural electric cooperatives and municipal utilities. Southwestern has over one hundred such "preference" customers, and these entities ultimately serve over 10 million end-use customers.

Name: Partner Energy | Gestão e Consultoria em Energia
Description:
Em 2016 foi criada a Partner Energy's como Consultoria Independente, com o ideal de trazer a seus clientes, produtos e serviços exclusivos voltados à redução de custos com energia. 

Ao longo de dois anos a empresa se consolidou no mercado e visando ampliar nosso atendimento e um trabalho diferenciado junto aos nossos clientes e parceiros, criamos uma nova empresa chamada PARTNER SERVICES Gestão e Consultoria em Energia e nos tornamos uma empresa associada ao grupo LASTRO ADMINISTRAÇÃO DE BENS E PARTICIPAÇÕES LTDA, que atua no mercado nacional desde de 2000 e possui participações em empresas de diversos segmentos, principalmente do Mercado Financeiro e Industrial Nacional, bem como inauguramos nossa nova sede em Campinas - São Paulo.
Temos o total orgulho de participar do selo anticorrupção do Instituto Ethos, demonstrando assim ao mercado a nossa transparência e posição, face um dos temas que assola nosso país.

Contamos com especialistas capacitados e prontos ao atendimento das necessidades de nossos clientes, com mais de quinze anos de experiência no Mercado de Energia, que estão sempre atualizados sobre as constantes mudanças das regulamentações do setor elétrico, por isso atendemos nossos clientes com a segurança, responsabilidade e transparência, visando o pleno atendimento a resultados e metas estabelecidas com excelência, superando as expectativas. 

Conheça um pouco mais sobre nossos produtos serviços em nosso site ou agende uma visita com um dos nossos especialistas.

Name: Hyvity
Description:
At HYVITY, we have a deep RESPECT for Nature and the forces it mobilizes in the service of LIFE. At its origin, there is WATER, precious and indispensable. An elemental power that has shaped our planet and allowed the development of human activity. It will play an essential role in its FUTURE.
Associated with GRAVITY, rivers are the source of a formidable renewable energy. By integrating into the natural water cycle, hydroelectric power plants combine human skills with the forces of nature to generate energy that is non-carbon based, RATIONAL, EFFICIENT AND SUSTAINABLE.
This is why Hyvity is committed to the long term, in SYNERGY with the territories and populations, to initiate virtuous circles by HARMONIOUSLY CO-DEVELOPING hydroelectricity production and sharing its resources.
Our perma-company designs, develops and manages small and medium-sized power plants as real MATRIX, integrated into their environment and their economy to, all TOGETHER, GROW A VIRTUOUS ENERGY today.

Name: H2O Power
Description:
H2O Power is investor owned and has operated Hydro Electric Generation in Ontario since 2007. Our Canadian sites include 8 hydroelectric generating stations, 2 control dams and 130km of transmission lines in Northern Ontario. We operate 140.5 MW of generating capacity, with annual energy production of over 835GWh, making us the third largest provider of hydroelectric power in Ontario. All of our Canadian generating stations are operated remotely from our Oshawa Control Center in Oshawa, Ontario, Canada.

H2O Power also owns and operates two run-of-river hydroelectric facilities in Pennsylvania, Allegheny 8 (13.6 MW) and Allegheny 9 (17.9 MW). The two projects comprise 31.5 MW of baseload nameplate capacity located on the Allegheny River. The Allegheny 8 & 9 facilities together generate approximately 200 GWh of clean electricity annually.

Description:
Tilsig (formerly Where₂O) is based with head office in Larvik and an innovation office in Svalbard, Longyearbyen. Our vision is to improve measurment of water flow in the nature. The applications of this is multitude, but in Norway hydro power stands out, and is our primary market.

Name: MV Dugar Hydro Division
Description:
Established in 1884, MV Dugar group is one of the esteemed business houses in Nepal. The commercial conglomerate encompasses agriculture, hydropower, banking, insurance, automotive, import, and export sectors. It is a pioneer in international trade in Nepal and takes pride in being the first-ever business in the country to have imported goods on a large scale. 

With its humble beginnings in the food grain sector, the group ventured into the manufacturing business. Its impact proved to be the major catalyst of the industrial revolution in Nepal. MV Dugar is also one of the largest private sector contributors to the infrastructure and rural development of Nepal. Today, with 32 branches and 4 hydropowers across the country and diversified business ventures, the group has been pursuing new heights relentlessly.

Name: KORPORATA ELEKTROENERGJETIKE SHQIPTARE Sh.a. Faqja Zyrtare
Description:
Energy of Albania (KESH) is the public producer and, at the same time, the largest electricity producer in Albania. KESH operates the most important electricity generating plants in the country.

These assets consist of the Drin River Cascade hydropower plants (Fierza HPP, Komani HPP and Vau i Dejës HPP), with an installed power capacity of 1,350 MW, and the Vlora TPP, with an installed power capacity of 98 MW. The cascade, built on the Drin River, is the largest in the Balkans, by installed capacity, as well as by the size of the hydropower plants. By operating 79% of the generation capacity in the country, KESH supplies about 70-75% of the customers’ demand for electricity, provides the energy needed to cover the losses in the transmission grid, as well as guarantees the security of the Albanian energy system through balancing energy and auxiliary services.

KESH is also responsible for the administration, the proper operation as well as for guaranteeing the technical and operational safety of the power plants it operates. KESH is not only one of the most important producers of electricity from hydro sources in the region, but is considered to have a regional impact, in terms of the security of hydro plants.

Name: Store2Hydro
Description: Starting in January 2024, Store2Hydro is a four-year initiative funded by the European Commission's Horizon Europe program. It's primary objective is to optimise electricity storage through the integration of reversible pump turbine technology into current hydropower infrastructures. This strategic approach has the potential to augment European storage capacity by up to 22TWh/y. The project entails validating inventive mechanical solutions for pumped storage and identifying untapped hydropower reservoirs, all in alignment with the objectives of the European Green Deal, while maintaining reservoir volumes. Additionally, the project introduces digital twin technology to enhance monitoring and adaptability to fluctuating renewable energy generation, thereby offering more efficient, cost-effective, and flexible hydropower operations.

Name: NEXT STEP ENERGY
Description:
NEXT STEP ENERGY (NSE) est une aventure entrepreneuriale issue de l’alliance d’un acteur majeur de la production d’énergie renouvelable français (TENERGIE) et du pionnier et leader des transactions dans les énergies renouvelables depuis 1977 (ENVINERGY).

Cette entreprise française développe des solutions innovantes de stockage propre d'énergie via des Stations de Transfert d'Energie par Pompage (STEP) permettant de stocker l'excédent d'électricité, notamment issu des énergies renouvelables, pour le restituer lors des pics de demande. 

Avec un impact environnemental réduit, une durée de vie supérieure à 100 ans et un savoir-faire industriel français, nos STEP territoriales contribuent à la transition énergétique tout en soutenant le développement local. 

Aujourd'hui, NSE c'est : 
- 250 sites étudiés
- 30 sites retenus pour une puissance de 120-150 MW 
- 0,5 milliard d’euros d’investissement prévus à horizon 5 ans
- des partenariats signés ou en cours de signature avec d’autres acteurs du monde de l’hydroélectricité.

NSE s’est structurée pour piloter toutes les phases de développement, de construction et d’exploitation d’un projet STEP avec des compétences dans le domaine des turbines, des pompes, et du développement territorial.

L'entreprise a également créé un Comité Scientifique composé d’experts de renommée internationale dans le domaine de l’hydroélectricité et des turbines-pompes pour l'accompagner dans le choix et le développement des technologies les plus appropriées pour répondre aux besoins en flexibilité du réseau électrique.

Notre devise : Stockez l'énergie proprement avec l'eau, pour la restituer quand vous en avez le plus besoin.

Name: HSI Hydro Engineering GmbH
Description:
HSI steht für Hydro Service International und wurde als die HSI  Hydro Engineering GmbH im Jahr 1982 von den zwei Maschinenbauingenieuren Harald Hersel und Herbert Pilz gegründet. Bis dahin hatten Hersel und Pilz bereits mehr als 24 Jahre Berufserfahrung im Bau von Wasserturbinen bei zwei Turbinenherstellern sowie als Planer und Berater bei einem großen internationalen Consultingunternehmen. 1997 wechselte Peter Marx nach einer 7-jährigen Berufstätigkeit bei einem führenden Energieversorgungsunternehmen aus dem Bereich Wasserkraftanlagen an Mosel und Saar und einem darauffolgenden Studium als Diplom-Ingenieur zu HSI und wurde ab 1999 geschäftsführender Gesellschafter.

Die Betriebsräume befinden sich im Trierer Hafen. Seit 2015 fügt sich das Unternehmen in die international tätige CETERUM-Holding GmbH ein.

Das Know-How der Firmeninhaber sowie die hohe Innovationsbereitschaft und ständige Weiterbildung der Mitarbeiter prägen das Unternehmen HSI und bilden damit die Basis für eine vertrauensvolle und professionelle Umsetzung Ihrer Projekte.
Zu den Kunden gehören Energieversorger, Kommunen oder private Wasserkraftbetreiber. Das Unternehmen ist weltweit tätig.

Name: STOR-HY: Innovative Storage in Hydropower

This is achieved by enhancing the lifetime and recyclability of components and equipment through smart monitoring and control technologies. It also targets challenging fields for storage application such as seawater and coal mines by developing technologies for harsh operating fluids.

Funded by the European Union.

Konsernet er tuftet på norske vannkrafttradisjoner kombinert med langsiktige eierinteresser tett involvert i virksomhet og drift. Opplysningsvesenets fond (Ovf) eier 50,1% av aksjene i Clemens Kraft Holding. Ovf ble stiftet I 1821 og er en av Norges største grunneiere målt etter areal. Name: Southeastern Power Administration SEPA
Description:
Southeastern Power Administration, also known as SEPA, is a Power Marketing Administration (PMA) established in 1950 by the Secretary of Interior to fulfill the functions assigned to the Secretary by the Flood Control Act of 1944. In 1977, the Department of Energy (DOE) was created, transferring SEPA and other agencies to its department. SEPA is headquartered in Elberton, GA, in the southeastern region of the United States. SEPA has the authority to market hydroelectric power and energy in Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Kentucky, Mississippi, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Virginia, and West Virginia. The hydroelectric power marketed comes from reservoir projects operated by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (Corps). 

SEPA markets the power and energy generated by the Federal reservoir projects at the lowest possible cost to its consumers. SEPA encourages the widespread use of the power marketed as preference in the sale of power is given to public bodies and cooperatives, referred to as preference customers. Unlike other PMAs, SEPA does not own transmission lines. Therefore, SEPA contracts with other utilities to provide transmission services for the delivery of Federal Power.

SEPA has many responsibilities as a PMA, including negotiating, preparing, executing, and administering contracts for the sale of electric power. SEPA prepares wholesale rates and repayment studies for Corps’ reservoir projects, supporting deliveries made to serve contractual loads. SEPA schedules hydropower generation at the Corps’ facilities located within SEPA’s marketing area.

Name: D-HYDROFLEX project
Description:
HYDROFLEX develops a toolkit of digital tools for digitally ‘renovating’ the existing hydroelectric power plants by developing technologies based on sensors, digital twins, AI algorithms, hybridization modelling (power-to-hydrogen), cloud-edge computing and image processing. Focus is on 3 areas  optimized operation planning,  predictive maintenance and real-time monitoring, and  increased market participation, while ensuring the cyber resilience of the developed tools.

D-HYDROFLEX will validate the developed framework in operational hydro plants in 5 countries across Europe (i.e., Spain  , France , Poland , Romania , Greece ), facilitating common practice among plant operators and taking into consideration all involved hydro plant aspects (operation , maintenance, sustainability) empowering hydro plant operators to conclude on the optimal solutions portfolio according to the plant capabilities, local energy system needs and environmental specificities.

Name: CDIF-UPC
Description:
CDIF is a R&D center within the Polytechnic University of Catalonia (UPC) founded by Prof. Eduard Egusquiza.

Its research activities are developed by a group of Ph.Ds in industrial engineering, with over 30 years of experience in the field of turbomachinery vibrations, diagnosis and preventive maintenance, damage detection and fluid dynamics. Our goal is to provide technological support to industry worldwide in areas related to the field of power generation groups diagnosis, focusing on hydropower.

Our center offers technology transfer services to industry by means of consultancy and technological innovation projects in our areas of expertise: analysis and diagnosis of vibration problems in turbomachinery, remote on-line monitoring, predictive maintenance, fluid dynamics studies and on-site specialised training.

We are part of the UPC's Mechanical Engineering, Fluids and Aeronautics Ph.D. program. Our main research lines are: Structural Analysis, Diagnosis, Fluid Dynamics Simulation and Cavitation. We actively participate in leading scientifical societies/meetings/congresses in our area of expertise and our research results are published in top-tier scientific journals internationally.

Name: Wemed Energy
Description:
Valorizziamo l’energia potenziale delle reti idriche.

Wemed Energy nasce nel 2025 dall’unione tra WECONS e Medra Servizi, due realtà italiane con competenze complementari nei settori idraulico, meccanico ed energetico.

WECONS, spin-off accademico dell’Università di Palermo, si è distinta fin da subito per il suo approccio innovativo nel campo della progettazione idraulica, che ha permesso di ottenere due brevetti nel campo delle turbine idrauliche, tecnologie che hanno ricevuto importanti riconoscimenti, tra cui il titolo di Start-Up della Green Economy al Premio per lo Sviluppo Sostenibile.

Medra Servizi, attiva dal 1975, è punto di riferimento nella fornitura di componenti per reti idriche, gas ed energie rinnovabili, distinguendosi da sempre come garanzia di qualità, affidabilità e servizi.

Oggi, insieme, produciamo il Power Recovery System (PRS): un sistema brevettato che trasforma la pressione in eccesso nelle reti idriche in energia elettrica pulita, senza modificare il funzionamento della rete.

Zero emissioni, nessun consumo aggiuntivo, solo energia recuperata da fluido che scorre.

Grazie a un monitoraggio continuo e a un’integrazione proattiva, il PRS migliora l’efficienza della rete, trasforma l'energia potenziale idrica e contribuisce agli obiettivi di decarbonizzazione. Questo lo rende la soluzione ideale per i gestori del ciclo idrico, consorzi di bonifica, comunità energetiche e realtà industriali che vogliono integrare sostenibilità e performance operative.

Affianchiamo i nostri clienti lungo tutto il processo: dalla progettazione alla realizzazione, offrendo impianti chiavi in mano e soluzioni su misura che integrano l’ingegneria idraulica con la transizione energetica, creando tecnologie che valorizzano ciò che già scorre nelle nostre reti.

L’acqua è già in movimento. Sta a noi trasformarla in valore.

Seguici per scoprire come uniamo ingegneria, innovazione e sostenibilità al servizio delle infrastrutture idriche!

Name: Bluewater Renewable Energy
Description:
Bluewater is a California-based, woman and minority-owned renewable energy company, committed to accelerating the energy transition by providing sustainable clean energy to the world.  

Bluewater is committed to being the most highly valued energy partner, through integrity, respect for people where we live and work, and respect for diversity, inclusivity, and the environment that sustains us.

These values are Bluewater; ensuring benefits are shared, that projects are sustainable for the environment and for local communities, for the long term.

California is on the front lines of climate change, facing heat waves, fires, drought, and other climate-related impacts.

Name: STORE Consortium

Name: FLEXHYBAT
Description:
Coordinated project between UPC and Universidad de Oviedo and granted by Ministerio de Ciencia e Innovación in Convocatoria 2022 "Proyectos de Generación de Conocimiento"

The main objective of this work is to develop a novel methodology to optimize the use and size of battery-based energy storage systems in future hybridization projects in hydropower. This will be relevant for operators and will also contribute to improving future hybridization projects in hydropower.

Our methodology will provide guidance in future hybridization projects considering the capacity of the unit, ancillary services to provide, grid scenarios (with massive entrance of new renewable effects) and negative effects of the climate change (extreme droughts that will cause extreme low water heads and flowrates) with the aim to optimize the following aspects:

 Remaining Useful Life of critical hydromechanical components of the unit
 Improve the overall efficiency of the unit and save water (in double regulated machines)
 Improve the quality of the ancillary services provided by the hybrid unit
 Increase circularity by reusing batteries from e-mobility
 Contribute to standardize second-life battery datasheets to facilitate reuse
 Proper use of the battery to extend the 2nd life
 Reduce costs by using second-life batteries.

Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto: Energía limpia y compromiso con el desarrollo sostenible de Ecuador

Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto es un proyecto ubicado en Santo Domingo de los Tsáchilas que está transformando el futuro energético de Ecuador. Diseñado para generar energía limpia y renovable, San Jacinto busca abastecer a millones de ecuatorianos mientras promueve el desarrollo económico, social y ambiental de las comunidades.

Desde su concepción, el proyecto ha sido una apuesta estratégica por la sostenibilidad. Con un diseño innovador que respeta los recursos naturales, San Jacinto opera sin embalses, permitiendo el paso del caudal ecológico del río Saloya y preservando la biodiversidad de la región. Este enfoque refleja nuestro compromiso con la protección ambiental y la adopción de prácticas responsables que aseguren un equilibrio entre progreso y sostenibilidad.

Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto también se distingue por su impacto social. Más allá de la generación de energía, trabajamos estrechamente con las comunidades locales para fomentar su desarrollo integral. A través de programas educativos, iniciativas de empleo y acciones de responsabilidad social, contribuimos a mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas que viven en nuestra área de influencia.

En el ámbito técnico, San Jacinto representa un ejemplo de innovación en el sector energético. Implementamos tecnología avanzada y prácticas eficientes para garantizar un suministro eléctrico confiable y de calidad, consolidándonos como un actor clave en el fortalecimiento del sistema energético nacional.

Nuestra visión trasciende la generación de electricidad. En Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto trabajamos para construir un Ecuador más sostenible, con un enfoque que combina excelencia operativa, responsabilidad social y respeto por el entorno natural. Creemos que cada acción cuenta para crear un impacto positivo, no solo en el presente, sino también en el futuro del país.

Name: KWKW Mühle AG
Description:
Die KWKW Mühle AG, ansässig in Berschis, ist ein etablierter Betreiber eines Wasserkraftwerks, das die Wasserkraft des Berschnerbachs zur Stromerzeugung nutzt. Seit mehr als zwei Jahrzehnten engagieren wir uns für die Nutzung erneuerbarer Energien und demonstrieren, wie traditionelle Wasserkraft effektiv für die heutigen Energiebedürfnisse genutzt werden kann.

Unsere Anlage baut auf der langen Geschichte der Wasserkraftnutzung auf, die nicht nur eine Mühle, sondern auch ein Sägewerk antrieb. Mit dem Ziel, dieses Erbe zu bewahren und gleichzeitig den Weg für die Nutzung nachhaltiger Energie zu ebnen, hat die KWKW Mühle AG die Wasserkraft des Berschnerbachs wiederbelebt. Heute steht unsere Anlage als Beispiel dafür, wie man Vergangenheit und Zukunft verbindet und sich für nachhaltige Entwicklung einsetzt.

Mit einer Spitzenleistung von 200 kWh und einer Jahresproduktion von über 900'000 kWh liefert die KWKW Mühle AG einen signifikanten Beitrag zur Energieversorgung in der Region. Unsere Jahresproduktion deckt mehr als 3% des Strombedarfs der Gemeinde Walenstadt, was unseren entscheidenden Beitrag zur lokalen nachhaltigen Energieversorgung unterstreicht.

Die KWKW Mühle AG ist ein wichtiges Beispiel dafür, wie erneuerbare Energiequellen in die lokale Infrastruktur integriert werden können. Wir setzen uns für den Schutz unserer natürlichen Umwelt ein und fördern den Einsatz von grünen Energiealternativen. Unsere Anstrengungen spiegeln das Bestreben wider, eine saubere, grüne Zukunft zu sichern und die Verantwortung, die wir gegenüber kommenden Generationen tragen.

Name: Qingzhou Boxinhuasheng Hydraulic Technology Co., Ltd.
Description: Established in 2001, Qingzhou Boxinhuasheng Hydraulic Technology Co., Ltd. now has become one of the biggest manufacturers specializing in hydraulic parts. With 350 employees, 20 enginers and advanced high-technology equipment, our annual output capacity has exceeded 1,300,000 pieces. Main Product contains Directional Control Valves, Gear Pumps, Steering Equipments and Power Units. With more than 500 models, they are widely used in the industries of construction, sanitation, drilling and mining, etc. Our factory covers an area of 63,800 square meters and has two factories. The two factories respectively correspond to the research and development, production, and sales of products for domestic and international markets. There are 350 employees in the factory, of which there are more than 20 engineers with more than 10 years experience. The current annual output capacity has exceeded 1,300,000 units, and the average annual output value is around 32 million dollars.
